task: Build ClawChain testnet faucet (clawinfra/claw-chain repo, issue #33). Create services/faucet/ with: Express.js API server + SQLite rate limiting (100 CLAW/24h per address, 10 req/hr per IP, 1000 CLAW with GitHub OAuth), single-page HTML/CSS/JS frontend (dark theme #0a0a0a + #00D4FF accent, address input, tx hash on success, countdown on cooldown, GitHub Boost x10 button), POST /faucet endpoint → {tx_hash, amount, next_drip_at}, GET /status, GitHub OAuth via passport-github2, transaction via @polkadot/api direct transfer from FAUCET_SEED sr25519, Dockerfile, .env.example (RPC_URL/FAUCET_SEED/GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/PORT), README with setup+deploy to faucet.clawchain.win. Clone to /tmp/claw-chain-faucet, branch feat/testnet-faucet, PR linking #33, use gh CLI (AlexChen31337).
